posts.text:
BREAKING: Qatar is set to fully shut natural gas liquefaction today, two sources close to the matter say.

Restarting natural gas liquefaction after a complete shutdown would take 2 weeks.

Once restarted, Qatar would need at least another 2 weeks to reach full capacity.

Qatar is the 2nd largest LNG exporter in the world.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
Fractals are everywhere. Hexagonal patterns resonate harmonically through nature and the entire universe.

Fractal graphene aggregates are natures prefect LEGO building blocks.  The smaller the blocks you build with the better you can engineer things for strength, durability and conductivity.

$hg $hgraf graphene gives us the tools to engineer everything we make better.  Nano carbon manufacturing is the future.  HydroGraph is at the epicentre of this future.
